name: Deep Mehta

bio: Computer Science student focused on backend engineering, AI systems, distributed systems fundamentals, and problem solving. Strong interest in AI engineering, backend architecture, APIs, databases, and system-level concepts, with a growing focus on building intelligent and production-oriented software systems.
